calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Donald Sherrill, Esq. (800-680-2426) of Hunt & Henriques for Judgment Creditor via Zoom VideoConference.
Yingming Li, (415-810-2315) Judgment Debtor in propria persona.
Mimi Lain, Badge #301079, Cantonese court interpreter for Judgment Debtor via Zoom VideoConference.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Judgment Debtor stated his friend helped him call counsel for Judgment Creditor and he agreed to pay $200.00 a month. Judgment Creditor will accept $200.00 of Sheriff's withholdings as November payment and collect $200.00 per month from wage garnishment beginning December. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION:
THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $231.96 HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $200.00 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO PAY $200.00/MONTH IN FUTURE THROUGH EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDERS.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Continued To Dec-06-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. DONALD SHERRILL, Esq. (Tel: 800-680-2426) for plaintiff/judgment creditor Bank of America, N.A. (via Zoom videoconference);
Defendant/judgment debtor YING MING LI (Tel: 415-810-2315) in pro per (in person);
MIMI LANE present assisting Mr. Li as a Cantonese-language court interpreter (via Zoom videoconference).

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S HEARING FOR DETERMINATION ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter discussed.

The Court continues this matter for further hearing to December 6, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. In the interim, parties are to meet and confer in an attempt to work out an agreed-upon payment schedule.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anthony DiPiero, Esq. 408-362-2276 of Hunt & Henriques for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Ying Ming Li, 415-810-2315 Defendant in Pro Per.
Joanne Tang, friend of the Defendant, interprets Cantonese for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Clerk administers the Interpreter's oath to Joanne Tang. The Court shares its views. Defendant argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

Granted. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Continued To Jan-29-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Anthony J. DiPiero, Esq. of HUNT & HENRIQUES, T:408.362.2276, for plaintiff/moving party, on Court Call;
Ying Ming Li, T:415.816.0989, defendant, appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: The court could not provide a Cantonese interpreter for defendant, Ying Ming Li. The Court requested the assistance of Mandarin-speaking court clerk Karen Liu to be able to communicate with the defendant. Therefore, per agreement of the parties, and on the Court's own motion,

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to January 29, 2020 at 9:30am in Department 302.

The Court directed Mr. Li to appear on January 29, 2020 and to bring his own interpreter.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
